<file>
00001| import { useState, useCallback } from 'react';
00002| import { alchemy, getAlchemyNetwork } from '../../../lib/alchemy/config';
00003| import { Network as AlchemyNetwork } from 'alchemy-sdk';
00004| import { isSpamToken } from '../../../lib/alchemy/spam';
00005| import { GetTokenBalancesByWalletResponse } from '../types';
00006| 
00007| /**
00008|  * Hook for fetching token balances for a wallet (alias for useGetTokensByWallet)
00009|  *
00010|  * @example
00011|  * ```typescript
00012|  * const { data, isLoading, error, fetchTokenBalancesByWallet } = useGetTokenBalancesByWallet();
00013|  *
00014|  * useEffect(() => {
00015|  *   fetchTokenBalancesByOwnerOnMultipleChains({
00016|  *     walletAddress: '0x123...abc',
00017|  *     chainIds: [1, 137, 10] // Ethereum, Polygon, Optimism
00018|  *   });
00019|  * }, [fetchTokenBalancesByOwnerOnMultipleChains]);
00020|  * ```
00021|  */
00022| export function useTokenBalancesByOwnerOnMultipleChains() {
00023|   const [data, setData] = useState<GetTokenBalancesByWalletResponse | null>(null);
00024|   const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(false);
00025|   const [error, setError] = useState<Error | null>(null);
00026| 
00027|   /**
00028|    * Fetch token balances for a specific wallet address across multiple chains (simplified response without metadata/prices)
00029|    *
00030|    * @param params - Object containing all parameters:
00031|    *   - walletAddress: string - The wallet address to get token balances for (e.g., '0x123...abc')
00032|    *   - chainIds: number[] - Array of chain IDs to query (e.g., [1, 137, 10] for Ethereum, Polygon, Optimism)
00033|    *   - includeNativeTokens?: boolean - Include native tokens like ETH, MATIC (default: true)
00034|    * @returns Promise<GetTokenBalancesByWalletResponse> - See type definition above for structure
00035|    */
00036|   const fetchTokenBalancesByOwnerOnMultipleChains = useCallback(async (params: {
00037|     walletAddress: string;
00038|     chainIds: number[];
00039|     includeNativeTokens?: boolean;
00040|   }): Promise<GetTokenBalancesByWalletResponse> => {
00041|     setIsLoading(true);
00042|     setError(null);
00043| 
00044|     try {
00045|       // Convert chainIds to networks and create portfolio addresses
00046|       const networks = params.chainIds.map(chainId => getAlchemyNetwork(chainId) as unknown as AlchemyNetwork);
00047|       const portfolioAddresses = [{
00048|         address: params.walletAddress,
00049|         networks: networks,
00050|       }];
00051| 
00052|       const response = await alchemy.portfolio.getTokenBalancesByWallet(
00053|         portfolioAddresses,
00054|         params.includeNativeTokens ?? true
00055|       );
00056|       const formattedResponse = (response as any as GetTokenBalancesByWalletResponse);
00057|       formattedResponse.data.tokens = formattedResponse.data.tokens
00058|         .map((token) => ({
00059|           ...token,
00060|           tokenBalance: token.tokenBalance.startsWith("0x") ? BigInt(token.tokenBalance).toString() : token.tokenBalance,
00061|         }))
00062|         // Filter spam tokens by local list of spam tokens
00063|         .filter((token) => !isSpamToken(token.network, token.tokenAddress));
00064|       setData(formattedResponse);
00065|       return formattedResponse;
00066|     } catch (err) {
00067|       const error = err instanceof Error ? err : new Error('Failed to fetch token balances for wallet');
00068|       setError(error);
00069|       throw error;
00070|     } finally {
00071|       setIsLoading(false);
00072|     }
00073|   }, []);
00074| 
00075|   return {
00076|     data,
00077|     isLoading,
00078|     error,
00079|     fetchTokenBalancesByOwnerOnMultipleChains,
00080|   };
00081| }
</file>
state.title: frontend/src/hooks/alchemy/portfolio/useTokenBalancesByOwnerOnMultipleChains.ts
